name: Aider
description: Open-source terminal AI assistant. [](https://github.com/Aider-AI/aider)

name: Expensify
description: Expense reporting, free personal reporting approval workflow

name: ZITADEL Cloud
description: A turnkey user and access management that works for you and supports multi-tenant (B2B) use cases. Free for up to 25,000 authenticated requests, with all security features (no paywall for OTP, Passwordless, Policies, and so on).

name: SerpApi
description: Real-time search engine scraping API.

name: Interval
description: SDK to build internal tools and scripts for your product.

name: copr.fedorainfracloud.org
description: Mock-based RPM build service for Fedora and EL.

name: Solo
description: Free AI website creator from Mozilla, create a beautiful website for your business from a few simple inputs. Free custom domain, no credit card needed.

name: Bitbucket
description: Unlimited public and private Git repos for up to 5 users with Pipelines for CI/CD

name: MemCachier
description: Managed Memcache service. Free for up to 25MB, 1 Proxy Server, and basic analytics

name: nmon
description: nmon — debugging API

name: Kinsta
description: Deploy static sites, apps, and databases from GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket and host headless WordPress.

name: Carbone
description: JSON into PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODS... API.

name: Envkey
description: Environment management with syncing mechanism for all apps.

name: Rollgate
description: Feature flag management with scheduled releases, instant rollback, and A/B testing. 13 SDKs included. Free plan up to 500K API requests/month, unlimited flags, 3 team members, no credit card required.

name: Visual Studio Code
description: A free, lightweight, cross-platform source code editor by Microsoft for Windows, Linux, and macOS, with support for debugging, syntax highlighting, intelligent code completion, Git integration, and more. Built with Electron and TypeScript.

name: UI Bakery
description: Low-code platform that enables faster building of custom web applications. Supports building UI using drag and drop with a high level of customization through JavaScript, Python, and SQL. Available as both cloud and self-hosted solutions. Free for up to 5 users.

name: Treblle
description: Treblle helps teams build, ship, and govern APIs. With advanced API log aggregation, observability, docs, and debugging. You get all features for free, but there is a limit of up to 250k requests per month on the free tier.

name: Lingo.dev
description: AI localization infrastructure. [](https://launchweek.dev/lw/2024/mega)

name: mailinator.com
description: Free, public email system where you can use any inbox you want

name: Fontshare
description: is a free fonts service. It’s a growing collection of professional-grade fonts, 100% free for personal and commercial use.

name: Commento
description: Privacy-centric embeddable comment system.

name: Wachete
description: monitor five pages, checks every 24 hours.

name: dns.he.net
description: Free DNS hosting service with Dynamic DNS Support

name: redirs.com
description: Easy domain redirects with auto-SSL, analytics, and URL path forwarding. Free for basic use (up to 5 domains).

name: Adapty.io
description: One-stop solution with open-source SDK for mobile in-app subscription integration to iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, Unity, or web app. Free up to $10k monthly revenue.

name: bonsai.io
description: Free 1 GB memory and 1 GB storage

name: Pixee
description: Automated vulnerability remediation. Fixes vulnerabilities and hardens code.

name: everystep-automation.com
description: Records and replays all steps made in a web browser and creates scripts, free with fewer options

name: Clair
description: Clinical AI Reference. Students have free access to the professional tool suite, which includes Open Search, Clinical Summary, Med Review, Drug Interactions, ICD-10 Codes, and Stewardship. Additionally, a free trial for the professional suite is available.

name: Tinybird
description: Real-time data streams to APIs. [](https://launchweek.dev)
